        and crawl_store_ready

assert_GivenImpliesThen.condition:
(object_storage_ok and postgres_ok) implies
        (current_state = "Reconstructed" implies
            and project_context_ready
            and registry_dag_ready
            and crawl_store_ready
            and ~session_affinity_used
            and ~warm_cache_used
            and ~prev_worker_conn_used)
